OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing is present. Represented by Mr. Newell.
Attorney Daniel Cheung appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Melvin Clark is present.
Attorney George Kalikman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The parties meet and confer.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
